eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mason, WA; at 2:39 PM on MAR 6, 2019 Effective until 4:39 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is Thurston County conducting a test of the Emergency Alert
System. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you
important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
